name: arcane-os-machine-bundle
description: Arcane OS WebView2/WebKitGTK shell and provisioner with Node native abstraction over framed IPC.

scripts.smoke: node tools/smoke-test-frontend-bridge.mjs && node tools/smoke-test-terminal-api.mjs && node tools/smoke-test-shell-catalog-ui.mjs && node tools/smoke-test-provisioner-partial-retry.mjs && node tools/smoke-test-windows-adapter.mjs && node tools/smoke-test-capability-policy.mjs && node tools/smoke-test-applications-api.mjs && node tools/smoke-test-api-concurrency.mjs && node tools/smoke-test-rpc.mjs && node tools/smoke-test-model-selection.mjs && node tools/smoke-test-ai-settings.mjs && node tools/smoke-test-user-transaction.mjs && node tools/smoke-test-privilege-broker.mjs && node tools/smoke-test-privilege-signature.mjs && node tools/smoke-test-privilege-claim-binding.mjs && node tools/smoke-test-privilege-encryption.mjs && node tools/smoke-test-privilege-tag-length.mjs && node tools/verify-privilege-boundary-source.mjs && node tools/smoke-test-release-integrity.mjs && node tools/smoke-test-installed-integrity.mjs && node tools/smoke-test-installation-postcondition.mjs && node tools/smoke-test-runtime-isolation.mjs && node tools/smoke-test-command-hardening.mjs
scripts.test:content-binding: node --test tools/content-binding.test.mjs tools/pipe-guard-monitor.test.mjs tools/unsigned-local-binding.test.mjs tools/windows-publication-recovery.test.mjs tools/windows-signing.test.mjs tools/worker-release-claims.test.mjs
scripts.verify:distribution:windows: node tools/verify-built-release.mjs dist/windows && npm run verify:winsecurity
scripts.verify:distribution:windows:unsigned-loc: node tools/verify-built-release.mjs dist/windows && npm run verify:winsecurity:unsigned-local-test
scripts.check: npm run build && npm run verify && npm run smoke && npm run test:app-packager && npm run build:apps:portable && npm run verify:apps
scripts.check:windows: npm run test:content-binding && npm run smoke:windows:release-directory-locks && npm run smoke:windows:installed-apps && npm run build:distribution:windows:unsigned-local-test && npm run verify:apps && npm run verify:app-catalog && npm run verify:distribution:windows:unsigned-local-test && npm run verify:windispatch
scripts.prepush: npm run check && npm run check:windows
scripts.build:distribution:windows: npm run verify:winhost && npm run build && powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File tools/build-windows-release.ps1
scripts.build:distribution:windows:unsigned-loca: npm run verify:winhost && npm run build && powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File tools/build-windows-release.ps1 -AllowUnsignedLocalRelease
scripts.build:windows:iteration: npm run verify:winhost && powershell -NoProfile -NonInteractive -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File tools/build-windows-iteration.ps1
scripts.build:linux: npm run build && npm run build:core:linux && bash tools/build-linux-webkitgtk.sh
scripts.verify:winhost: node tools/verify-windows-host-source.mjs && node tools/verify-windows-dpi.mjs && node tools/verify-windows-iteration-source.mjs && node tools/verify-ollama-service-host.mjs
